title: Beyond Mamushi
overview: When Kate Andrews moved into her dream home with perfect partner Chris Sherbourne, she could never have imagined that her life would be turned on it's head. Chris, now craving power, inflicts bouts of sadistic psychological violence causing Kate to experience violent sporadic hallucinations.  Kate realises that her once dream home has far more going on, with the possibility of an impending personal antithesis that could open an unimaginable hell.
